subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: How bitterly cold was that winter! We arrived at a caravansary located by a moat. The journey was full of sufferings and difficulties
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه زمستان سردی بود و ما در کاروانسرائی وارد شدیم
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @growth of the Cause
